alerts.source: Bourbon World / Big Red monthly rare & allocated bottle list
alerts.locationName: Big Red Liquors / Bourbon World Indiana locations
alerts.inventorySemantics: Indiana is a private retail market. ATC permit rows identify active package-store locations but are not bottle inventory. Use these as store/location coverage and retailer-targeting infrastructure; only retailer shop endpoints/pages should become bottle watch or inventory signals.
alerts.reason: New store_aggregate retailer_allocated_raffle_item signal for Van Winkle Special Reserve 12 Year in IN.
alerts.evidence: Van Winkle 12yr appears on Bourbon World's current rare/allocated bottle list with 3 bottles at $219.99. Winners are drawn from VIP entrants; verify details with Bourbon World/Big Red.
